# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

apiVersion: kong.konghq.com/v1
kind: KongService
metadata:
  name: service-a
spec:
  hostname: service-a
  connect_timeout: 5000
  plugin_ids:
    - limit-conn
    - access-log

---

apiVersion: kong.konghq.com/v1
kind: KongService
metadata:
  name: service-b
spec:
  hostname: service-b
  connect_timeout: 5000
  plugin_ids:
    - limit-conn
    - access-log

---

apiVersion: kong.konghq.com/v1
kind: KongRoute
metadata:
  name: api-route-a
spec:
  service: service-a
  hosts:
    - a.example.com
  paths:
    - /api/service-a/*
  strip_path: true
  plugins:
    - access-log
    - custom-headers
      remove_headers:
        - X-Forwarded-Proto
      add_headers:
        - Host: a.example.com

---

apiVersion: kong.konghq.com/v1
kind: KongRoute
metadata:
  name: api-route-b
spec:
  service: service-b
  hosts:
    - b.example.com
  paths:
    - /api/service-b/*
  strip_path: true
  plugins:
    - access-log
    - custom-headers
      remove_headers:
        - X-Forwarded-Proto
      add_headers:
        - Host: b.example.com
